articleTitle: Big Grizzly Mountain Runaway Mine Cars
introSection: Big Grizzly Mountain Runaway Mine Cars is a steel launched roller coaster located at Hong Kong Disneyland. It opened as part of the park's large expansion in 2012 and is commonly considered the park's replacement to Big Thunder Mountain.
fullText: Big Grizzly Mountain Runaway Mine Cars is a steel launched roller coaster located at Hong Kong Disneyland. It opened as part of the park's large expansion in 2012 and is commonly considered the park's replacement to Big Thunder Mountain.
